tagline: Bundled plugin — hooks and setup skills. Being deprecated.
longDescription:
`youcoded-core` is a bundled YouCoded plugin that ships with the app. It contributes a small number of safety hooks (write-guard, worktree-guard), a session-start hook, and two first-run helper skills (`setup-wizard`, `remote-setup`). It's auto-installed at `~/.claude/plugins/youcoded-core/` so most users never touch it directly.

**Heads up — this plugin is being deprecated.** `write-guard` is moving into the app natively, the remaining helpers are being folded in or retired, and the repo will eventually be archived. Existing installs keep working; new capabilities are landing in the app itself or in dedicated marketplace plugins (`youcoded-encyclopedia`, `youcoded-inbox`, `wecoded-themes-plugin`, etc.) rather than here.
